title: T-007 — outbox_events emitter wrapper for fa.* events
prompt:
# T-007 — outbox_events emitter wrapper for fa.* events

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §4.1, §3.1, §15 events list
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide a typed emitFaEvent(eventType, productCode, payload, ctx) helper that writes one outbox_events row per call inside the caller's DB transaction, with strongly typed event names: fa.created, fa.core_closed, fa.dept_closed, fa.built, fa.built_reset, fa.allergens_changed, brief.converted.

## Implementation contract
New packages/outbox/src/emit-fa-event.ts: function takes (db tx, eventType union, aggregateId, payload jsonb, ctx={tenant_id, app_version}) and INSERTs into outbox_events with aggregate_type='fa' (or 'brief' for brief.converted). Use Drizzle. Reject unknown event types via type union. Tests assert insert + idempotent on retry with same dedup key.

## Files
- packages/outbox/src/emit-fa-event.ts [create]
- packages/outbox/src/event-types.ts [create]
- packages/outbox/__tests__/emit-fa-event.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given emitFaEvent(tx,'fa.created','FA0042',{...},ctx) called, when transaction commits, then outbox_events has one row with event_type='fa.created' aggregate_id='FA0042'
2. Given typing emitFaEvent(tx,'fa.unknown','FA0042',{},ctx), when pnpm typecheck runs, then TS reports type error (not assignable to event union)
3. Given the same call repeated with same dedup_key inside one tx, when committed, then exactly one row exists (idempotent)

## Test strategy
- RED: tests for insert + type check failure (compile-time) + idempotency
- Run 'pnpm --filter outbox test && pnpm --filter outbox typecheck'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass tx context (always require tx parameter)
- Do not write outside outbox_events table
- Do not allow free-form event_type strings

pipeline_inputs.description: Typed emitFaEvent helper that writes domain events to outbox_events inside caller transactions.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drizzle-based emitter with discriminated union of event_type. Function inserts payload JSONB row, uses dedup_key for idempotency. Event union exported from event-types.ts.
out_of_scope: Do not implement consumer side here
Do not introduce websocket or queue brokers

Given calling with event_type 'fa.unknown', when pnpm typecheck runs, then TS reports a type error
Given same call repeated with same dedup_key inside one tx, when committed, then exactly one row exists

Run 'pnpm --filter outbox test && pnpm --filter outbox typecheck'
risk_red_lines: Do not allow free-form event_type strings
Do not write to any table besides outbox_events
